text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Ikuno Dictus receives a<n>commendation from the
student<n>council for identifying the person who
made a mess of the flowerbed.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
So, I hear you used cleat tracks to<n>solve the
flowerbed incident.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I didn't do it alone. The case<n>would still be a
mystery if not for<n>Bamboo and Helios's
cooperation.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Still, using the culpr—ah,<n>Bamboo's—footprints to
figure out<n>what happened is quite a feat.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
One might even say it was a stroke of<n>genius.
Surely your knowledge of<n>cleats is second to
none.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Not at all. I simply have a great deal of<n>respect for
cleat-fitters and some<n>rudimentary knowledge of
their craft,<n>having studied it in my own time.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Respect, you say? Indeed, the master<n>cleat-fitter
can discern a runner's<n>growth and bad habits
from their<n>cleats alone.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Y-yes... That's exactly right. You<n>seem very
well-informed yourself.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
...Are you by any chance acquainted<n>with a
cleat-fitter?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Yes. A certain someone has taken<n>good care of
me for many years. I<n>always get them to make
my cleats.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
I thought as much! In fact, I've<n>thought so for
some time!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Is that right?

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Your speed, your center of gravity,<n>your form...
They're all flawless in<n>every respect!

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
But no ordinary cleats would be able<n>to endure
such exemplary running.<n>You would need cleats
of the same<n>caliber!

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text: Yes, that's it! I knew you had custom<n>cleats!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: H-hey...

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Oh, and Air Groove! Pardon my<n>impertinence, but
I wonder if you<n>wouldn't benefit from switching
to<n>heavier cleats...

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
I'm positive it would improve your<n>performance
on corners!

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text: And as for you hiding under the desk<n>there! Teio!

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
I think you could truly realize your<n>potential with
lighter cleats. It would<n>relieve some of the burden
on you<n>while you run!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Ooh, I see... Wait, how did you know I<n>was here?!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Well, it's certainly clear that you've<n>got a deep
passion for cleats. One<n>might even say too deep.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Essentially, I forgot myself for a<n>moment and
started rambling about<n>cleats...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Well, it happens. Don't worry about it<n>too much.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
But I've always struggled with this.<n>Honestly,
this lack of self-control<n>worries me sometimes...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Oh boy, you're really beating yourself<n>up about
this, huh?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Oh, nice timing. Did you hear all that?<n>Can you
offer a few words of<n>encouragement?
choice_data_list:
Are you confident that what you said was
accurate?
Can you pick out some cleats for me too?
Can you pick out some cleats for me too?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Oh, nice timing. Did you hear all that?<n>Can you
offer a few words of<n>encouragement?
choice_data_list:
Are you confident that what you said was
accurate?
Can you pick out some cleats for me too?
Can you pick out some cleats for me too?

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Of course I am. If I wasn't confident, I<n>wouldn't
have said any of it.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
So, what's the trouble? You came out<n>with all
that 'cause you want what's<n>best for the
student council, right?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
This'd be a whole nother story if the<n>student
council didn't want to hear it,<n>but did any of them
look like they<n>wanted you to pipe down?

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text: Not particularly, but...
choice_data_list: Then there's nothing to worry about.
Then there's nothing to worry about.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text: I... suppose. All right, I'll take your<n>word for it.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text: Oh, in that case!

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
If it's not a bother, then I really ought<n>to
recommend them all a cleat<n>specialist I know!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Oh, look at what you've unleashed...<n>You sure
that was the best advice?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: But humans don't wear cleats...

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Hm. Cleats for humans? Now that<n>you mention
it... I've never given it<n>much thought.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
With the differences in skeletal<n>structure and
muscle mass... No, it'd<n>be better to start by
considering the<n>merits of fitting a human with
cleats in<n>the first place...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Uhhh, Ikuno? I think maybe you've<n>gone and
slipped into cleat mode<n>again.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
At any rate, I need something to work<n>off of.
Trainer, would you mind<n>running for me? That'll
help us<n>establish the best approach!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Hoo boy, I sure didn't see this<n>coming...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Still, this is for Ikuno's benefit, soI'm gonna help out. You should too! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Hearing that, I don't think refusing is<n>an option.
And so, I find myself roped<n>into Ikuno Dictus's
human cleat<n>research.
